$Comment: The Sawmill work station block. SHARED id with RpgStations' own jar default (maintainer decision): this pack file overrides that default via pack load order, so the block's StationAsset (Server/RpgStations/Stations/Sawmill.json) becomes the MMO-bridged one. Model reuses the vanilla Lumbermill bench. BlockType.Seats is the seat hold mode's mount anchor (StationAsset.Hold.Seat.Enabled - see the RpgStations mod's station/CLAUDE.md); Offset stands the player back at working distance rather than seated inside the bench. Yaw 180: the engine adds a hard +180deg to the authored seat yaw (BlockMountPoint.computeRotationEuler - a chair's sitter faces AWAY from the block at authored 0), so 180 lands the worker facing the work surface.
